contract = Path('governance/protocols/CURATOR_INTAKE_CONTRACT.md')
samples_dir = Path('governance/transport/samples')
samples_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem533_1_telegram_intake_activation.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem533_1_telegram_intake_activation.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

text = contract.read_text(errors='ignore') if contract.exists() else '# Curator Intake Contract\n'
text = text.replace('Active sources in BEM-531: GPT and Claude. Telegram is reserved/deferred.', 'Active sources: GPT, Claude and Telegram synthetic/webhook branch. Live Telegram API/token handling remains out of file scope and secrets must never be stored in repo files.')
text = text.replace('"source": "gpt|claude|telegram_deferred"', '"source": "gpt|claude|telegram"')
text = text.replace('## Telegram policy\nTelegram branch is part of the broader architecture but deferred out of BEM-531 execution scope. Records may reserve `source=telegram_deferred`, but no Telegram E2E is required in BEM-531.', '## Telegram policy\nTelegram branch is active for synthetic/file-based curator intake in BEM-533. Live Telegram token/API integration is not required and secrets must not be written to files. Telegram records use `source=telegram` and `source_ref=telegram-webhook-synthetic` for tests.')
if '## BEM-533 Telegram activation' not in text:
    text += '\n\n## BEM-533 Telegram activation\nTelegram synthetic/webhook branch is now included in curator intake schema. The branch enters through curator and then follows the same internal role cycle.\n'
contract.write_text(text)

telegram_active = {
  'record_type': 'curator_intake',
  'cycle_id': 'bem533-sample-telegram-active',
  'source': 'telegram',
  'source_ref': 'telegram-webhook-synthetic',
  'request_title': 'Synthetic Telegram curator intake',
  'request_body': 'User request from Telegram webhook normalized by curator',
  'priority': 'normal',
  'curator_status': 'ASSIGNED',
  'next_role': 'executor',
  'blocker': None,
  'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 12:56 (UTC+3)'
}
sample_path = samples_dir / 'curator_intake_telegram_active_sample.json'
sample_path.write_text(json.dumps(telegram_active, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-533.1 | Telegram Intake Schema Activation | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:56 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- CURATOR_INTAKE_CONTRACT обновлён: Telegram synthetic/webhook branch активирован в schema.\n- Создан active Telegram sample record.\n- Live token/API не используется; secrets не пишутся в файлы.\n\n## Files\n- governance/protocols/CURATOR_INTAKE_CONTRACT.md\n- governance/transport/samples/curator_intake_telegram_active_sample.json\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-533.1 PASS: Telegram curator intake activated synthetically without secrets/live API.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(contract), str(sample_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-533.1 activated Telegram synthetic curator intake schema')
